title: Czech President Petr Pavel pays a visit to Latvia
summary_full: On 10th–11th March, Latvian President Edgars Rinkēvičs will play host the President of the Czech Republic, Petr Pavel, and First Lady, Eva Pavlova, who are on a state visit to Latvia.
summary_public: On 10th–11th March, Latvian President Edgars Rinkēvičs will play host the President of the Czech Republic, Petr Pavel, and First Lady, Eva Pavlova, who are on a state visit to Latvia.
